title: NotebookReferences
description: The set of LIVE, auto-refreshing references a user's notebook embeds to FinOS figures (FR-WS-002). Provided by Module 13 (Workspace) to Focus (Module 9) and any module wanting to know which figures the user is actively watching. A reference holds a render-only last-known value + FreshnessStamp; it is NOT a copy of the figure and Workspace performs no money arithmetic on it. A reference whose underlying money value is stale renders flagged/withheld; one whose target is deleted/revoked/version-skewed resolves to 'unavailable' — never a stale cached number as if current, never a silent blank (Constitution VIII, SC-W-010).

profile_id.description: Owning profile; scoped server-side from the session identity, never a client-supplied id.

freshness.description: Freshness of this published projection; each reference also carries its own per-figure freshness.

page_id.description: Notebook page the reference is embedded in.

target_contract.description: The upstream contract $id the figure resolves from (e.g. 'finos:cashsafety/RunwayForecast/1.0.0', 'finos:spine/GoalState/1.0.0').

value_path.description: JSON path of the referenced figure within the upstream object.

label_en.description: Inline label EN (e.g. 'current runway'); bilingual — single-language is a defect.

resolution_state.description: withheld = stale MONEY figure (Constitution VIII); unavailable = target deleted/revoked/version-skewed (SC-W-010). Never 'live' for a stale money figure.

cached_amount_cents.description: Last-known amount in integer minor units, typed exactly as upstream; render-only, never re-rounded/summed here. null for non-money or unavailable references.

cached_rate.description: Last-known rate/fraction as a decimal string; render-only. null when not a rate.

goal_ref.description: Optional GoalState link for time-to-goal context (FR-X-004).

freshness.description: Inherited from the owning contract; stale money ⇒ resolution_state withheld.
